data.title: 21shares announces distribution for 21shares Solana ETF (TSOL) for staking rewards earned from its SOL holdings.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, 21shares, a global leader in cryptocurrency exchange traded products (ETPs), revealed details regarding the distribution for the 21shares Solana ETF (TSOL). The distribution encompasses staking rewards obtained from their SOL holdings. 21shares is renowned as one of the prominent issuers of ETPs worldwide.

data.title: Cboe now offers nearly 24-hour trading for Russell 2000 Index options, with record volumes in 2025.
data.description: Cboe has introduced cash-settled options for the Russell 2000 Index (RUT) during its Global Trading Hours, extending trading times to nearly around-the-clock for RUT, S&P 500 Index, and Cboe Volatility Index options. Both RUT options and Cboe's Global Trading Hours saw significant growth, setting record volumes in 2025. This update was announced on February 12 in Chicago.

data.title: US Department of Commerce raises duties on Chinese battery-grade graphite to 160%+ in final ruling.
data.description: The U.S. Department of Commerce has implemented a significant increase in duties on Chinese battery-grade graphite, setting the new rate at over 160% in their final determinations. This move is part of ongoing efforts to address trade imbalances and protect domestic production, with the heightened duties intended to level the playing field for American manufacturers.
VENEZUELA ACTING PRESIDENT RODRIGUEZ TO NBC: ELECTION DATE WILL BE DECIDED THROUGH POLITICAL DIALOGUE; COMMITS TO HOLDING FREE, FAIR ELECTIONS.

data.title: IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) added to MSCI USA Index on Feb 27, 2026, after market close.
data.description: Today, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) revealed its inclusion in the MSCI USA Index, set to take effect after market close on February 27, 2026. This move signifies a significant milestone for IREN, as it positions the company for increased visibility and potential growth opportunities in the upcoming period.

data.title: Martello reported financial results for Q3 FY26, focusing on achieving positive cash flow post restructuring. Sales were $2,988, down from $3,718 in Q3 FY25. Liquidity was strengthened with a $2M loan from Wesley Clover International. Collaboration with Mitel and advancement in Mitel Performance Analytics noted. Management committed to future growth. Total sales for the nine months ended December 31, 2025, were $9,075, down from $11,155 in the same period in 2024. Gross margin was $7,668 as of 2025.
data.description: Martello Technologies Group Inc. released financial results for the three and nine months ended December 31, 2025. Sales for the three months ended were $2,988, a decrease from $3,718 in the previous year. Cost of Goods Sold was $480, resulting in a Gross Margin of $2,508. The Company remains focused on achieving positive cash flow post-restructuring and is collaborating with Mitel on an updated Mitel Performance Analytics (MPA) commercial agreement. Liquidity was strengthened with a $2M loan agreement. Management is committed to establishing a strong foundation for future growth and innovation in MPA continues with the release of MPA 3.6. Terence Matthews, Chairman of Martello, emphasized the importance of the strategic partnership with Mitel. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.
Appili Therapeutics discloses financial and operational updates for Q3 FY2026; showcases robust performance.

data.title: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: GEHC) declares $0.035 per share dividend for Q1 2026, payable on May 15, record date April 3.
data.description: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: GEHC) announced a cash dividend of $0.035 per share of Common Stock for the first quarter of 2026. The dividend will be payable on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 3, 2026. GE HealthCare is a prominent provider of healthcare solutions, offering advanced medical technology, pharmaceutical diagnostics, and AI, cloud, and software solutions to clinicians worldwide.

data.title: DexCom (NASDAQ: DXCM) reports better-than-expected Q4 results with earnings of 68 cents per share. Stock remained flat in trading.
data.description: In Thursday's after-hours trading, shares of DexCom Inc. (NASDAQ: DXCM) remained stable following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company posted earnings of 68 cents per share, surpassing the Street's forecast of 65 cents. For more information, visit Benzinga.com to read the complete story.

data.title: Pan Global files NI 43-101 report for mineral resource estimates at Escacena Project in Spain. TSXV: PGZ, OTCQB: PGZFF, FRA: 2EU.
data.description: Pan Global Resources Inc. (TSXV: PGZ, OTCQB: PGZFF, FRA: 2EU) based in Vancouver, BC, revealed on February 12, 2026, the submission of an independent Technical Report on SEDAR for its Escacena project. This filing marks a significant step for the company in its development process.

data.title: NuriEdge introduces AI coaching platform to help middle managers and teams facing burnout, fatigue; aims to provide executive-level support at scale.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Denver, NuriEdge introduced its AI-driven coaching platform to address the increasing issues of burnout, emotional exhaustion, and retention struggles faced by organizations. The platform is tailored to assist middle managers and their teams in coping with the pressures of their work environment.

data.title: NSG sponsors second webinar on AI and copyright licensing hosted by National Press Foundation.
data.description: A webinar will be held in New York on February 12, 2026, by the National Press Foundation. The event will concentrate on AI Licensing. The Next Solutions Group (NSG), a renowned corporate reputation consultancy, will be hosting this webinar in collaboration with the Copyright Alliance. This will be their second free webinar.
